_comment: Renovate runs ALONGSIDE Dependabot (.github/dependabot.yml), which owns
VERSION bumps for uv / github-actions / devcontainers / docker. To avoid
duplicate PRs, Renovate here does ONE thing Dependabot cannot: pin Docker
image tags and GitHub Actions to immutable @sha256 digests and keep those
digests fresh. All version (major/minor/patch) updates are disabled.

packageRules.description: Dependabot owns version bumps; Renovate only manages digests.
Pin GitHub Actions to immutable commit SHAs and refresh them.
